# 🌌 AI Mastermind Alliance (AIMmA): 2026 Vision & Architecture Whitepaper

**Status**: ACTIVE | **System Mode**: 6 (Cognitive Expansion) | **Target**: Scholar Convergence 2027

**Classification**: SOVEREIGN DIRECTIVE (Level 1)
